{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323203252D86C53F51E51C90BB365"}"},"total":968},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6983933989677712163","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整本书内容很好看，每个人都有自己的特色，尤其是雕哥，完全是一个搞笑担当呀，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626073851,"group_id":"6963273731946843149","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大神每周三更，不拖更","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N44IOuVukWiDB0cHKhAvruuUhtuUCIXI8dLrqkgYcL8l","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ef88deaf01d04c668b4050e1ad8ebd61~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795163&x-signature=jaybcxsdlblToUSXo7d0zgVHcvk%3D","user_id":"2471347285658782","user_name":"一醉南柯uikd"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2471347285658782","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6963273731946843149","book_info":{"abstract":"苏晓穿越神祇时代，觉醒主神系统。
　　别人的信徒都是鲛人、幽魂、精灵等生物……
　　他的信徒却是异界招来的第四天灾（玩家），可以通过杀怪为主神提供信仰。
　　于是乎……
　　别的主神还是伪神的时候，苏醒晓已经真神了。
　　别人真神，苏醒晓已经至高神。
　　更恐怖的是，苏醒晓的信徒可以无限复活。
　　他们有黑科技！
　　他们还是一群奇葩的创造狂魔！
　　【永远滴神】：火球术+寒冰箭=冰火两重天？
　　【大胃王】：天青蛮牛吃过的草用来当火锅底料，涮的灵药效力将会提升两倍。
　　【MC王者】：我偷你这条矿建个诺亚方舟不过分吧。
　　……
　　其他主神：
